summary: Iter 6 PASSED end-to-end. Backend (12/12 new pytest cases in test_iter6_sales_debts_expenses.py): (1) DELETE /api/sales/{id} restocks every item, decrements client.balance/total_spent by total and points by points_earned, returns {ok, restored_total, restored_points}; admin/tesoureiro OK, funcionario→403, unknown id→404. (2) GET /api/dashboard returns all new fields week_sales_total, month_sales_total, suppliers_debt, suppliers_debt_orders, suppliers_debt_expenses, today_debtors_count; aggregate identity suppliers_debt = orders + expenses verified. (3) GET /api/clients/{id} returns consumption {day,week,month,year} aggregated from sales — verified ≥4€ in every bucket after a 4€ sale. (4) GET /api/clients-with-debt returns only balance>0 sorted desc, no _id leakage. (5) Supplier expenses CRUD: funcionario POST→403; admin/tesoureiro POST OK; list sorted asc by due_date; PUT paid:true auto-sets paid_at to ISO timestamp, PUT paid:false clears paid_at; tesoureiro can update but NOT delete (403); admin DELETE OK. (6) Dashboard suppliers_debt_expenses increases by exactly the unpaid expense amount when a new expense is created. FRONTEND (Playwright, admin+func1): Sidebar shows STOCK and CLIENTES section headers; nav-dividas visible to admin AND funcionario; Dashboard renders 8 KPIs including kpi-week-sales, kpi-month-sales, kpi-suppliers-debt, kpi-debtors; /dividas page loads with 12 debtors (after wait), each row hyperlinks to /clientes/{id}; ClienteFicha consumption-breakdown shows 4 cards (Consumo hoje / Esta semana / Este mês / Este ano); admin sees delete-client-btn, funcionario does NOT; Vender modal opens from ficha, clicking sell-product cards adds to cart, sell-total updates (0,80 € for one MINI 0.20), sell-submit-btn creates sale and closes modal, new cancel-sale-{id} row appears; clicking cancel-sale (admin) confirms via dialog and removes the sale (3→2 rows); funcionario sees 0 cancel-sale buttons (UI gated correctly); Payment modal shows payment-open-amount (13,60 €), payment-total-credit visible, payment-change visible when amount > debt; /fornecedores tab-expenses works, add-expense-btn opens modal, expense-submit-btn creates expense row, expense-toggle-{id} flips paid (toast 'Marcada como paga'); funcionario navigation to /fornecedores returns to dashboard (no access).

issues: Labels are 'Consumo hoje / Esta semana / Este mês / Este ano' — clear and consistent with the rest of the PT-PT copy. Optional: shorten to 'Hoje / Semana / Mês / Ano' to match the smaller breakdown KPI cards' titles in the Dashboard for visual symmetry. Not blocking.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py cancel_sale (line 542): restock and balance/points reversal performed sequentially without a transaction; if MongoDB drops mid-loop, stock partially restored. Acceptable for current scale but a multi-doc txn would harden it.
server.py update_supplier_expense (line 1112-1115): paid_at handling is correct — auto-set on flip to true, cleared on flip to false. Good caixa-style ergonomics.

server.py dashboard (line 660-662): suppliers_debt is the sum of orders.balance_due (paid=false) + expenses.amount (paid=false). Note that supplier_expenses uses full amount as the debt (no partial payments) — by design but worth surfacing in PRD if partial-pay is needed later.

server.py client_detail consumption (line 454-468): uses string ISO comparisons over sales.created_at (also ISO). Works because both stored & computed values use isoformat() in UTC; safer than tz-naïve parsing.

DividasHoje.jsx: simple, focused page (137 lines). Good UX — empty state with 🎉 emoji and search filter on name/member_number/contact. data-testid coverage complete (dividas-page, dividas-search, debtor-row-{id}, debtor-ficha-{id}).

ClienteFicha.jsx is now 876 lines — over the 700-line threshold from code-review guide. Recommend splitting into ClienteFicha + <SellFromFichaModal/> + <PaymentModal/> + <NotifyModal/> + <EditClientModal/> for maintainability before the next iteration.
Fornecedores.jsx is 719 lines — also just over threshold. Consider extracting <ExpensesTable/> + <ExpenseModal/>.
All new UI elements carry data-testid (sell-product-{id}, cancel-sale-{id}, expense-toggle-{id}, payment-change, payment-total-credit, kpi-* etc.) — excellent test ergonomics.
Cancel-sale uses window.confirm() dialog rather than a styled shadcn AlertDialog — functional but inconsistent with the rest of the dark-theme UI. Optional polish.

success_rate.backend: 100% (12/12 iter6 + all prior regression suites unaffected)
success_rate.frontend: 100% on all verified flows (sidebar groupings, 4 new KPIs, /dividas, sell-from-ficha, cancel-sale, payment overpay, expenses CRUD, role-gating)

test_credentials: admin@ard.pt/admin123, tesoureiro@ard.pt/tesoureiro123, func1@ard.pt/func123. Sócio: 1982/1234 (Ana Ferreira — currently 8,99 € debt after iter6 testing).
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created several TEST_iter6_Prod_* products, TEST_iter6_Client_* clients (some with residual debt: 3€ and 9€), and TEST_iter6_exp_* supplier_expenses. UI test created one 'TEST_iter6_UI_exp' supplier expense (42,50 €). One real sale was created on a debtor via the UI sell-modal (MINI 0.20 for 0,80 €) and then cancelled via cancel-sale — net zero. Production data unchanged.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 6 regression suite is /app/backend/tests/test_iter6_sales_debts_expenses.py (12 tests, all green). DELETE /api/sales/{id} is admin+tesoureiro only and FULLY reverses a sale (stock+balance+total_spent+points). /api/clients-with-debt returns balance>0 sorted desc. supplier_expenses collection added — note expenses use full amount as debt (no partial payments yet). Dashboard now exposes 8 KPI test ids: kpi-today-sales, kpi-week-sales, kpi-month-sales, kpi-debt(outstanding_debt clients), kpi-suppliers-debt, kpi-stock-value, kpi-clients, kpi-debtors. ClienteFicha is at 876 lines and Fornecedores at 719 — both exceed the 700-line guideline; suggest split in iter 7. There are currently 12 debtors in prod; Ana Ferreira (1982/1234) carries 8,99 € so the pay-with-points UI now does render on her sócio portal.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no functional bugs. One first-run UI assertion ('Debtor rows: 0') was a test timing artifact (queried before /api/clients-with-debt resolved); after adding a 2s wait the page correctly listed 12 debtors. Frontend page itself is correct: DividasHoje.jsx fetches once on mount and renders rows once data arrives — verified visually and via assertions on the second pass.
